imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Cartoon icon of a dog and cat heads, clean vector-like style, transparent background (app-icon-dog-cat.dim_512x512.png)
- Cartoon icon of a dog and cat heads, clean vector-like style, transparent background (app-icon-dog-cat.dim_192x192.png)
- Cartoon icon of a dog and cat heads, clean vector-like style, transparent background (app-icon-dog-cat.dim_32x32.png)

existing_features.title: Add a new cartoon-style app icon depicting the heads of a dog and cat, store it as generated static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated, and update the app to use it for browser/app icons (e.g., favicon).
Update the patient card UI (surgery case card) so the Arrival date is displayed in the top-right corner of the card header area instead of in the demographics grid.
Add an Age field to the patient card (surgery case card) that calculates the pet’s age from the stored Date of Birth and displays it in years and months.

new_feature_requests.summary: Change the app icon to a cartoon head of a dog and cat
Move the arrival date to the top right corner of the patient card
Add a patient card field that calculates pet age in years and months
